channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on AI mischief, follow Robert Hart. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Hacking the first generation of AI chatbots was a laughably simple affair. […]

item.title: I tried my favorite 360 action camera as a point-and-shoot with this grip accessory — here’s what I learned
item.description: Are action cam accessories that turn your Insta360 and DJI into a point-and-shoot any good? I tested the Insta360 X5 Photography Grip to find out.

item.title: How to watch Premier League final day 2026: Free streams, TV channels, scenarios
item.description: All the ways to watch the Premier League final day online from anywhere, as Tottenham and West Ham's relegation battle goes down to the wire.

item.title: Test Honor 600 Pro : un écran ultra-lumineux et une batterie géante, mais vaut-il son prix ?
item.description: Extérieurement, il ressemble à l'iPhone 17 Pro. Intérieurement, son équipement est résolument haut de gamme, avec un téléobjectif, la charge sans fil et un système d'exploitation complet, utilisant l'IA pour travailler, mais aussi se détendre.

item.title: LG voit les choses en grand : son moniteur OLED géant de 49 pouces est bradé à -36 %
item.description: Grâce à ses fonctionnalités liées à l'intelligence artificielle, sa résolution WQHD et une excellente luminosité, le LG UltraGear dispose d'une très bonne fiche technique, à découvrir pour 500 euros de moins chez Amazon.

item.title: Topo Designs Rover Trail Pack Is the Best Backpack I’ve Ever Used
item.description: Unsurprisingly, the Denver gorpcore brand that makes many of the best bags in the world has delivered a perfect backpack.

item.title: The Best Browser Extensions to Get More Out of YouTube
item.description: You can significantly improve the YouTube experience with these browser add-ons.

item.title: Why Nuro thinks being a robotaxi ‘second mover’ gives it an advantage
item.description: Waymo is the undisputed leader in the robotaxi space, operating a fleet of over 3,000 driverless cars in at least 10 cities across the US. A number of companies, including Tesla, Zoox, Avride, and Motional, are racing to catch up with the Alphabet-owned firm. But what if being No. 2 was actually better? Nuro, the […]

item.title: These Robots Are Making Meals for a Nonprofit in San Francisco’s Tenderloin
item.description: A nonprofit in the city’s most troubled district has turned to robotic meal prep tech to make up for a dearth of human volunteers.
